auth.sessionExpiring: Your session will expire in 5 minutes due to inactivity.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

events.title: Events
events.noEvents: No events yet. Create your first event.

empty.filtered: No events match your filters. Try broadening your search.

unfiltered.title: No events yet
unfiltered.description: Create your first event to start hosting attendees.

empty.title: No payouts yet
empty.description: Your revenue will appear here after the first paid event closes.

preferences.title: Notifications
preferences.subtitle: Choose exactly which notifications you want to receive. Security and billing alerts cannot be disabled.
preferences.emptyDescription: Check back later, our catalog grows regularly.
preferences.errorLoadingDescription: Check your connection and try again in a moment.
preferences.mandatoryTooltip: This notification is required for your security.
preferences.pushDisabledTooltip: Enable push notifications in the banner above to use this channel.
preferences.unsavedCount: {count, plural, one {# unsaved change} other {# unsaved changes}}
preferences.pauseAllMarketingDescription: Disables every marketing notification in one click. You can re-enable them individually below.
preferences.pageHeaderDescription: Choose which notification lands on which channel — email, in-app, push and SMS. Security and billing alerts cannot be disabled.
preferences.quietHoursDescription: Non-urgent notifications queue during this range and deliver after. Mandatory alerts (security, payment) always get through.
preferences.quietHoursTooltip: Times are interpreted in your current timezone.
preferences.categoriesDescription: Coarse switches for each email family. Combined with the per-notification toggles below.
preferences.perKeyDescription: One switch per supported channel for each notification.
preferences.testSendAria: Send a preview of {name} to my inbox
preferences.testSendMandatoryTooltip: Mandatory notifications cannot be tested from this page.
preferences.testSendRateLimited: You've reached the test limit (5/hour). Try again later.
preferences.testSendNotOptable: This notification is mandatory and cannot be simulated.

emailCategories.transactionalDescription: Registration confirmations, event reminders, badge ready notices.
emailCategories.organizationalDescription: Team invitations, role changes, and organization updates.

categories.authDescription: Sign-ins, email verifications and password changes.
categories.transactionalDescription: Registrations, badges and confirmations for your events.
categories.billingDescription: Payments, receipts and subscriptions. These alerts remain mandatory.
categories.organizationalDescription: Team invites, role changes and organization activity.
categories.marketingDescription: Product updates, tips and offers. Opt out any time.

notifications.title: Platform notifications
notifications.subtitle: Enable, disable and fine-tune channels for every system notification. Changes are audited.
notifications.empty: No notifications found in the catalog.
notifications.errorDescription: Something went wrong loading the catalog. Please retry.

drawer.title: Edit notification
drawer.subtitle: Adjust channels and email subject for this notification.
drawer.channelsHelp: Pick at least one channel among those the code supports.
drawer.subjectHelp: Leave empty to keep the template's default subject.

meta.mandatoryHint: Mandatory notification — users cannot opt out.

delivery.title: Notification observability
delivery.subtitle: Track delivery, opens and suppressions across the platform.

focusBody.after: and click 'Observability' on the relevant key to get a detailed funnel and the last 20 rows of the dispatch log.

delivery.emptyChart: No activity in the selected window.
delivery.emptyChannel: No active channel in the window.
delivery.errorTitle: Unable to load the delivery dashboard
delivery.errorDescription: Try again in a few moments.

unknown.title: An unexpected error occurred
unknown.description: Please try again in a moment. If the problem persists, contact support.

TIMEOUT.title: Connection too slow
TIMEOUT.description: The request timed out. Check your connection and try again.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Internal error
INTERNAL_ERROR.description: Something went wrong on our side. Our team has been notified — please try again shortly.

FORBIDDEN.title: Action not allowed
FORBIDDEN.description: You don't have permission to perform this action.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Invalid data
VALIDATION_ERROR.description: Please check the information in the form.

CONFLICT.title: Action already performed
CONFLICT.description: This action conflicts with the current state. Refresh and try again.

duplicate_registration.title: Participant already registered
duplicate_registration.description: This participant already has an active registration for this event.

RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.title: Too many attempts
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.description: Please wait a moment before trying again.

REGISTRATION_CLOSED.title: Registration unavailable
REGISTRATION_CLOSED.description: Registration isn't open for this event.

event_not_published.title: Event in draft
event_not_published.description: Publish the event to open registrations.

event_archived.title: Event archived
event_archived.description: Restore the event to reopen registrations.

ZONE_FULL.title: Access zone is full
ZONE_FULL.description: This zone has reached its maximum capacity. Redirect the participant to another zone or wait until another badge exits.

EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED.title: Email not verified
EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED.description: The participant must verify their email before this action.

ORGANIZATION_PLAN_LIMIT.title: Plan limit reached
ORGANIZATION_PLAN_LIMIT.description: This action exceeds your current subscription limits. Upgrade your plan to continue.

QR_ALREADY_USED.title: Badge already used
QR_ALREADY_USED.description: This badge has already been scanned for this event.

QR_EXPIRED.title: Badge expired
QR_EXPIRED.description: This badge is no longer valid.

QR_NOT_YET_VALID.title: Badge not yet valid
QR_NOT_YET_VALID.description: Try again once the event opens.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
